# Metaguise
 
> India's leading metal facade company. 1800+ projects delivered pan-India.
> Headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana. Est. 2019.
> Last Updated: 2026-03-23
 
## About
Metaguise is India's premier metal facade specialist offering parametric
cladding systems and turnkey architectural metal solutions since 2019.
We design and install luxury metal facades for residential, commercial,
and institutional buildings across India.
Featured in Architectural Digest ADPro. 361K+ Instagram followers.
India's most trusted name in parametric facade design.
 
## Why Metaguise
- 1800+ completed projects across India
- Custom parametric facade design — no two projects alike
- In-house design, engineering and manufacturing
- Pan-India installation team
- Metaland Experience Center in Gurugram (DLF Phase 2)
- Featured in Architectural Digest ADPro
- Pioneers of parametric metal facade design in India since 2019
 
## Services
- Metal Facade Design and Installation
- Parametric Facade Design
- Architectural Metal Cladding
- Metal Elevation for Residential Buildings
- Metal Elevation for Commercial Buildings
- Retrofit Metal Facades
- Luxury Building Exteriors
- Custom Metal Cladding Solutions
- Kinetic Facade Systems
- Perforated Metal Panels
- Ventilated Facade Systems
 
## All Products
MetaCoin — Coin matrix parametric panel, India's most popular metal facade panel
MetaSequin — Sequin-inspired reflective parametric panels
Cascading Keys — Kinetic cascading key pattern facade system
MetaShingles — Fish scale inspired metal shingle panels
MetaFlute — Vertical fluted panel for elegant facades
MetaLouver — Louver-based shading and ventilation system
MetaCassette — Modular cassette panel cladding system
MetaWood — Wood-textured metal panel with modern performance
MetaPatina — Aged patina finish for vintage character facades
MetaCorten — Weathered steel look panels with industrial finish
MetaPyramid — Pyramid pattern parametric facade panel
MetaFold — Folded geometric precision panel
MetaFin — Sleek fin-style shading and architectural detail
MetaHydra — Fluid water-inspired dynamic surface panel
MetaPlank — Plank-style panel with natural texture
MetaGate — Decorative and structural gate solutions
MetaSlider — Modular sliding system for flexible facades
MetaBlox — Modular block-inspired parametric system
MetaCopper — Luxury copper-finish surface panels
MetaGrey — Neutral grey minimalist panel
Solid Panel — Durable versatile solid surface panel

Casa Stilgrove — Premium residential facade

DLF4 — Premium residential facade
Espace Nirvana — Luxury residential project
